message:
test(core): end-to-end session restore happy path and proptest for checkpoint preference

session_restore.rs:
- New integration test session_restorer_successful_restore_marks_clean_
  and_keeps_capture_checkpoint_usable validates the complete happy-path
  restore lifecycle: detect -> load_checkpoint -> restore -> verify
  database state.  Asserts restored/failed counts, scrollback_result
  and scrollback_error are None, shutdown_clean is set to true, startup
  checkpoint is created with old_to_new pane mapping, original capture
  checkpoint remains the preferred restore snapshot, restore banner is
  sent, and clean session is no longer detected as restorable.

proptest_session_restore.rs:
- New proptest db_load_latest_checkpoint_prefers_restorable_capture_
  over_newer_startup_checkpoint validates that a startup checkpoint
  (which has metadata but no pane_state rows) does not shadow the
  preceding shutdown capture checkpoint when calling
  load_latest_checkpoint.  Uses randomized capture_at, startup_delta,
  and pane_id.
- Added scrollback_result: None and scrollback_error: None fields to
  RestoreSummary construction in arb_restore_summary strategy and
  display_format_restore_summary test to match struct changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
